content:
I need to count relations where both source and target are within the Types_Layer namespace.

Looking at the Types_Layer namespace, it contains: CLIOptions, DiagramMetadata, DesignInfo, DesignPatternInfo, ArchitecturalDecision, ProcessInfo, ProcessStage, AnnotationConfig, ClassHighlightConfig, ClassAnnotation, DiagramConfig, GlobalConfig, ArchGuardConfig, MermaidConfig, GitHistoryManifest, CochangeEdge, RiskFactors, ContributorSummary, FileHistoryMetrics, PackageHistoryMetrics, GitHistoryArtifacts, Module, ArchJSON, Entity, Member, Parameter, SourceLocation, Decorator, Relation, ArchJSONMetrics, FileStats, CycleInfo.

The only explicit relation in the Types_Layer diagram is:

`GlobalConfig <|-- ArchGuardConfig` — both are in Types_Layer. ✓

No other relations listed in the Types_Layer diagram have both source and target within the same namespace.

{"answer": 1}
